focus: [D4-A9/D4] sub-agent/Task delegation laundering: proof token must travel in dispatch payload and re-validate at the child's Open Design tool boundary

graphEvents.label: How can sk-design proof survive sub-agent/Task delegation before a child calls Open Design?
Agent I/O evidence is optional/advisory and cannot be the mandatory design proof-token carrier by itself
cli-opencode has a design proof-card scaffold, but the cli family lacks a shared mandatory design proof-token payload
A child must re-validate the design proof token immediately before Open Design mutating tool calls
The parent must demand back token/result/tool-call digests and replay them before accepting delegated design output
Design/Open Design child dispatches must carry DESIGN_PROOF_TOKEN v1 in the payload
Child Open Design mutation calls must deny missing, expired, or payload-mismatched design proof tokens
Parents must accept delegated design/Open Design results only after token/result/tool-call replay succeeds

label: Agent I/O cannot be the mandatory proof-token carrier because its dispatch and evidence fields are optional/advisory
recommendation: Create a separate DESIGN_PROOF_TOKEN v1 block mandatory only for delegated design/Open Design tasks.
enforcement: ENFORCEABLE for predicate-scoped prompt lint and child gate; ADVISORY if stored only as Agent I/O evidence.

label: cli-opencode has a design proof-card scaffold, but cli-codex/cli-claude-code lack an equivalent shared proof-token dispatch contract
recommendation: Extract a shared cli-family design_delegation_payload.md include with DESIGN_PROOF_TOKEN v1 plus proof-card ordering.
enforcement: ENFORCEABLE on rendered prompt fixtures; ADVISORY for child taste quality.

label: Child Open Design mutating tool calls need pretool/proxy re-validation of the dispatch token and outgoing payload digests
recommendation: Deny start_run, od run start, od ui respond, follow-up generation messages, and equivalent automation unless token fields and payload digests validate at the child tool boundary.
enforcement: ENFORCEABLE for structural payload checks and denial; ADVISORY for final visual quality.

label: Parent acceptance needs DESIGN_PROOF_RESULT demand-back and transcript replay, not only child prose or Agent I/O evidence
recommendation: Require DESIGN_PROOF_RESULT v1 with token id, validation status, tool digests, proof card digest, transcript reference, and missing fields before parent accepts child output.
enforcement: ENFORCEABLE when JSON/tool events are captured; ADVISORY for text-only transcripts.

label: Any child dispatch that may make design decisions or invoke Open Design mutations carries DESIGN_PROOF_TOKEN v1 in the dispatch payload.
A child cannot call Open Design generation/mutation tools until token expiry, loaded-file hashes, allowed tools, and outgoing payload digests validate.
Parent accepts delegated design/Open Design output only after DESIGN_PROOF_RESULT and captured tool-call digests match the dispatched token.

direction: Use Agent I/O evidence alone as the hard design proof-token carrier
reason: The contract explicitly makes dispatch/evidence metadata optional and advisory, and strict evidence validation still does not block.
